ogTitle: Fishermans Bay vs Fishermans Reach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fishermans Bay and Fishermans Reach.
heading: Fishermans Bay vs Fishermans Reach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fishermans Bay, New South Wales and Fishermans Reach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fishermans Reach has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Fishermans Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fishermans Bay or Fishermans Reach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fishermans Bay has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Fishermans Reach scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fishermans Bay scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Fishermans Reach scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fishermans Bay or Fishermans Reach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fishermans Reach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
